productDisplayName: Puma Women Commander White Pink Shoe
description: Crafted for those healthy walks for the woman of style, the puma Commander shoe is replete with feminity and ergonomic comfort in its retro design. Earn the benefits of healthy walks by teaming this with performance clothing, or simply pair it with jeans or skirts and stylish tops for that cool casual look.Upper Synthetic leather upper with synthetic overlays on the sides for midfoot support and durability Perforations on the toe box for breathability Lace-up system with loop for snug, customised Fit Mildly padded tongue and collar with fabric lining for breathable, snug fit Midsole TPU midsole for lightweight comfort and durability Padded sockliner for in-step comfort Outsole TPR outsole in herringbone pattern for maximum grip and traction Curved outsole in a boat pattern for enhanced traction Outsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe guard and heel guard for protection and durability
